description: Append-only log of every XP-earning action for a learner. One row per event. Total XP is derived by summing xp_awarded for a learner. Events are written by the progression engine when a stage completes, an artifact is approved, or a course is completed.

fields.name: source_type
fields.description: What action earned the XP. stage_completed = one of the 6 stages finished. artifact_approved = final artifact passed evaluation. course_completed = all modules and artifacts in a course approved.

fields.name: source_id
fields.description: ID of the object that triggered this XP event. For stage_completed: learner_6e_stage_progress.id. For artifact_approved: artifact_submissions.id. For course_completed: learning_path_courses.id.

fields.name: xp_awarded
fields.description: XP points awarded for this event. Suggested defaults: stage_completed=10, artifact_approved=50, course_completed=100.

fields.name: module_id
fields.description: The module this XP relates to. Populated for artifact_approved and course_completed events to support module-level XP dashboards.

constraints.name: chk_xp_positive
constraints.description: XP awarded must always be a positive integer

indexes.name: idx_xp_learner_id
indexes.description: Fetch all XP events for a learner (sum for total XP)

indexes.name: idx_xp_learner_source_type
indexes.description: Filter XP events by type for a learner

indexes.name: idx_xp_source_id
indexes.description: Check if XP has already been awarded for a given source (idempotency guard)

indexes.name: idx_xp_earned_at
indexes.description: Time-series XP history for learner progress chart

relationships.description: Nullable — only for artifact and course events

xp_rules.note: These are suggested defaults. Adjust per product requirements. Total XP = SUM(xp_awarded) WHERE learner_id = :lid.

idempotency_note: Before inserting an XP event, check SELECT id FROM xp_events WHERE source_id = :source_id AND source_type = :source_type. If a row exists, skip insertion. This prevents double XP on retry.
